_comment: Bad case 04 — INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND while parked at LSZR. Engine must reject via flight_phase precondition (allowed_phases excludes PARKED/GROUND_READY). Part B simulates the aircraft taking off and reaching pattern altitude; the same call is then accepted with a downwind clearance. Guards the rejection_ground branch in flight_phase::check_precondition for INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.
name: Bad case 04 — inbound call while parked (LSZR EU)

say.note: Part A — pilot makes inbound call while still parked
say.text: Altenrhein Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo inbound for landing

say.note: Part B — simulate climb-out and pattern altitude near the airport

say.text: Altenrhein Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo inbound for landing
